_comment: Forward-compatible ecosystem registry. The page renders official plugins + the founding cohort TODAY; as community plugins arrive it grows into a capability-organised directory (group by `category`, tier within each: official > recommended > community) with NO page rewrite — just more rows here. `categories` is the published taxonomy a plugin slots into. `tier`: official (Pyxle team) | recommended (community, reviewed, the suggested default for its category) | community (listed, meets standards). `contract` names the capability interface a plugin implements, so providers in one category become swappable by config — the ecosystem's real differentiator.

plugins.name: pyxle-db
plugins.description: One explicit-SQL API over SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL — portable placeholders, a uniform Row, checksum-tracked migrations, and the DatabaseLike contract other plugins build on.

plugins.name: pyxle-auth
plugins.description: Email + password accounts on argon2id — sliding sessions, password-reset and verification flows, wildcard RBAC, scoped API tokens, and request guards. Fail-secure by default.
